overall.description: Cinematic game footage of a circular gothic-style classroom with students in dark robes seated around a large central table, featuring ornate stained glass windows, blue vaulted ceilings with gold filigree, and warm chandelier lighting. The camera slowly pans across the room showcasing the detailed architecture and ambient atmosphere typical of a magical school setting.

tall arched stained glass windows with intricate blue and gold designs, allowing diffused natural light
elaborate hanging chandelier with multiple candle-style lights suspended from the ceiling
high vaulted ceiling painted in deep blue with gold structural ribs and decorative elements
tall wooden bookshelf filled with books and artifacts against the left wall
large framed portraits or paintings hanging on the left wall

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand circular classroom with gothic architecture, featuring a large central wooden table surrounded by students in dark robes. The room is illuminated by warm chandeliers and natural light filtering through tall stained glass windows, with blue vaulted ceilings and wooden bookshelves lining the walls. The camera slowly pans to reveal the ornate details of this magical school interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping camera movement that reveals the expansive scale and ornate details of a grand gothic classroom. It begins with a wide cinematic view of the circular room, focusing on students in dark robes gathered around a large central wooden table. As the camera pans, the perspective shifts to highlight the interplay between the warm glow of chandeliers and the natural light filtering through tall stained glass windows. The scene then expands upward and outward, showcasing the blue vaulted ceilings adorned with gold filigree and the wooden bookshelves lining the walls. Finally, the movement settles to emphasize the intricate architectural harmony of the magical school interior.
